page_content:
Formerly: BIOE658M.

BIOE652 Regulatory Affairs in Medical Product Development (3 Credits) An introductory course on regulations associated with the development and production of medical devices and pharmaceuticals.

Restriction: Restricted to Master's of Engineering - Bioengineering students; or permission of Fischell Department of Bioengineering. Credit Only Granted for. BIOE652, ANTH627 or BIOE658R.
